Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

LING869 Seminar in Neurolinguistics (3 Credits)

Current topics in research on neurolinguistics.

Prerequisite: LING640 or LING641; or permission of ARHU-Linguistics department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. LING869 or LING889A.
